title: ULTRACRAFT
description:
This Mod is a Tribute to the Game ULTRAKILL by Arsi "Hakita" Patala.
It recreates its Weapons, Enemies and even Mechanics like parrying and movement tech
body:
This mod depicts overexaggerated, cartoony pixel blood and violence; if that's too mature for you, don't play it.

 

ULTRACRAFT

Mankind is Dead. Blood is Fuel. Hell is Full.

This Mod is a Tribute to the Game ULTRAKILL by Arsi "Hakita" Patala.

Contents

  • 7 Levels
  • A Soundtrack
  • Cybergrind
  • UltraHUD
  • Node//Block based Scripting System to make functional Levels like in Ultrakill
  • Blood (and a lot of it too!)
  • All Prologue and Limbo Enemies
  • 19 Weapons (Revolver Variants + Slab, Shotgun Variants & Machine Sword, Nailgun Variants, Flamethrower, Soap, and an original one)
  • Parry and offhand Punch Mechanic
  • Ultrakill movement tech (enter High Velocity mode pressing V) (even including things like Wall-Jumps, Alternate Underwater Physics and Slam Storage)
  • A bunch of Blocks and Items
  • Lots Settings for Server/World configuration
  • Intro sequence and Custom Main Menu Backgrounds (toggleable)
  • Structures
  • Customizable Wings
  • Almost too Customizable Terminals

ULTRACRAFT Discord
Join our community-run Discord Server to connect with other fans of the mod and discover Modpacks and Servers using it!
https://discord.gg/BWcnACAvHC

V2.2.0 Release Trailer

Other Information

The mod is fully Server compatible; for serverside config stuff gamerules are used. (they all start with an "ultra-" prefix to make them easier to find)

Some Items have hidden lore. This is usually Jokes or dev Comments. To see it, press F3+H to enable advanced tooltips.

Currently the mod isn't integrated into normal gameplay that much. Enemies don't spawn in the world, Some items aren't obtainable in survival, etc. I plan on changing that in a future update.

Feel free to put this mod in modpacks, but I wouldn't recommend doing so as it's a bit unstable and probably won't mesh well with many other mods lol
